title: Archive
seo_title: Client Site Archive — Denver WordPress Developer | Austin Schuetz
seo_description: A decade of freelance and agency web work from a Denver WordPress developer. Live sites and Wayback-preserved builds, grouped by era.

blocks.heading: A decade of sites, kept honest.
blocks.lede_md: Before the products, I built websites for people — a decade of them: gyms, glassblowers, illustrators, and national brands, freelance from Denver and in-house at a studio. This is the record.

blocks.heading: Need a site built or rescued?
blocks.body_md: I still take on front-end and WordPress work for Denver clients and remote teams. New build or a rebuild of something that's aged out — either works.
